meta.name: QBH Vapi Tool Configs (Production Canonical)
notes: Canonical production snapshot aligned to QBH Architecture Decisions + Production Verification.
Manus is not part of runtime; all tool URLs use getquarterback.com.
provider_id is a UUID string; attempt_id is a number (bigint-compatible).
This file is meant to be copied into Vapi tool definitions / assistant variables config.

tools.name: start_call
tools.description: Starts an outbound scheduling call via Vapi using system-provided variables (attempt_id, provider_id, patient_name, provider_name, preferred_timeframe, demo_autoconfirm). Typically invoked from the web UI when the user clicks Handle It / Approve Call.

tools.name: get_candidate_slots
tools.description: Generates alternative time suggestions from the patient's calendar. Use ONLY when Kate needs to SUGGEST times TO the office (e.g., the office says 'what times work for you?'). Do NOT use this when the office offers a specific time — use propose_office_slot instead.

attempt_id.description: Internal attempt id (bigint-compatible). Provided by Vapi call variables; never ask the office.

provider_id.description: Provider UUID string. Provided by Vapi call variables; never ask the office.

tools.name: propose_office_slot
tools.description: Use THIS tool when the office offers a specific date/time (e.g., 'Friday at noon', 'June 17th at 2pm'). Records the offered time, checks for calendar conflicts, and returns what Kate should say next. This is the primary tool for the booking flow.

office_offer_raw_text.description: Raw text of the office-offered datetime, e.g. 'March 10th at 12 PM'.

tools.name: confirm_booking
tools.description: Finalizes the appointment. In demo fast lane (demo_autoconfirm=true), this is called immediately after propose_office_slot returns next_action=CONFIRM_BOOKING.

attempt_id.description: Internal attempt identifier passed during call initiation

provider_id.description: Provider UUID passed during call initiation

demo_autoconfirm.description: When true, enable fast-lane behavior (accept office time, auto-confirm, end call).

verification_checklist: All tool URLs start with https://getquarterback.com/api/vapi/
attempt_id is type number; provider_id is type string (UUID).
No default fields in tool schemas; values flow from assistant variable injection / UI.
Assistant is configured with variables: attempt_id, provider_id, patient_name, provider_name, preferred_timeframe, demo_autoconfirm.
Routes exist in Next.js App Router: start-call, webhook, get-candidate-slots, propose-office-slot, confirm-booking.
